subcodes.first_line: O dear handmaid of God! Thy letter hath arrived. Praise be to God thou hast become the cause of the diffusion of the divine fragrances in the northern countries
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه شما رسید الحمد لله در ممالک شمال سبب نشر نفحات شدی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar
